Parametric Boeing 747 with hump, swept wings, four under-wing engines, tail fin, and landing gear

Error: AI returned malformed JSON: Expected ',' or ']' after array element in JSON at position 5833 (line 74 column 69). Raw extracted text was:
{
  "clearGraph": true,
  "reasoning": "Rebuilding the Boeing 747 from scratch with a clean, fully parametric IR program that compiles correctly. All parts are driven by sliders, no dead nodes, and all connections are explicit.",
  "genome": {
    "archetype": "airliner",
    "detailBudget": "medium",
    "parts": [
      { "id": "fuselage", "role": "focal" },
      { "id": "right_wing", "role": "wing" },
      { "id": "left_wing", "role": "wing" },
      { "id": "right_engines", "role": "engine", "count": 4 },
      { "id": "left_engines", "role": "engine", "count": 4 },
      { "id": "vertical_stab", "role": "tail" },
      { "id": "right_h_stab", "role": "horizontal_stabilizer" },
      { "id": "left_h_stab", "role": "horizontal_stabilizer" },
      { "id": "landing_gear", "role": "undercarriage" }
    ]
  },
  "params": [
    { "name": "totalLength", "value": 70, "min": 40, "max": 100 },
    { "name": "fuselageRadius", "value": 3.5, "min": 2, "max": 6 },
    { "name": "wingSpan", "value": 60, "min": 30, "max": 80 },
    { "name": "wingRootChord", "value": 15, "min": 8, "max": 25 },
    { "name": "wingTipChord", "value": 4, "min": 2, "max": 8 },
    { "name": "wingSweepAngle", "value": 35, "min": 20, "max": 45 },
    { "name": "engineRadius", "value": 1.5, "min": 0.8, "max": 2.5 },
    { "name": "engineLength", "value": 8, "min": 4, "max": 12 },
    { "name": "tailHeight", "value": 8, "min": 4, "max": 15 },
    { "name": "dihedralAngle", "value": 5, "min": 0, "max": 10 }
  ],
  "body": [
    { "let": "halfSpan", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "wingSpan/2" } },
    { "let": "wingRootX", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "totalLength * 0.4" } },
    { "let": "sweepRad", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "wingSweepAngle * pi / 180" } },
    { "let": "tipLE_x", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "wingRootX + halfSpan * tan(sweepRad)" } },

    { "let": "fuse_x_fracs", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.8, 1] } },
    { "let": "fuse_y_fracs", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0.1, 1, 1.2, 1, 0.8, 0.2] } },
    { "let": "fuse_x", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a * totalLength", "a": "$fuse_x_fracs" } },
    { "let": "fuse_y", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a * fuselageRadius", "a": "$fuse_y_fracs" } },
    { "let": "fuse_z", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0] } },
    { "let": "fuse_pts", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$fuse_x", "y": "$fuse_y", "z": "$fuse_z" } },
    { "let": "fuse_curve", "op": "spline", "args": { "points": "$fuse_pts", "closed": false } },
    { "let": "fuselage", "op": "revolve", "args": { "profile": "$fuse_curve", "angle": 360, "axis": "X" } },

    { "let": "wing_x_vals", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0, 1, 2, 3] } },
    { "let": "wing_x", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a==0 ? wingRootX : (a==1 ? tipLE_x : (a==2 ? tipLE_x + wingTipChord : wingRootX + wingRootChord))", "a": "$wing_x_vals" } },
    { "let": "wing_y_right", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a==0 ? 0 : (a==1 ? halfSpan : (a==2 ? halfSpan : 0))", "a": "$wing_x_vals" } },
    { "let": "wing_y_left", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a==0 ? 0 : (a==1 ? -halfSpan : (a==2 ? -halfSpan : 0))", "a": "$wing_x_vals" } },
    { "let": "wing_z", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0, 0, 0, 0] } },
    { "let": "right_wing_pts", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$wing_x", "y": "$wing_y_right", "z": "$wing_z" } },
    { "let": "left_wing_pts", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$wing_x", "y": "$wing_y_left", "z": "$wing_z" } },
    { "let": "right_wing_curve", "op": "polyline", "args": { "points": "$right_wing_pts", "closed": true } },
    { "let": "left_wing_curve", "op": "polyline", "args": { "points": "$left_wing_pts", "closed": true } },
    { "let": "right_wing_solid", "op": "extrude", "args": { "curve": "$right_wing_curve", "height": 0.6 } },
    { "let": "left_wing_solid", "op": "extrude", "args": { "curve": "$left_wing_curve", "height": 0.6 } },
    { "let": "pivot_root", "op": "point", "args": { "x": "$wingRootX", "y": 0, "z": 0 } },
    { "let": "right_wing", "op": "rotate", "args": { "shape": "$right_wing_solid", "angle": "$dihedralAngle", "axisX": 1, "axisY": 0, "axisZ": 0, "pivot": "$pivot_root" } },
    { "let": "left_wing", "op": "rotate", "args": { "shape": "$left_wing_solid", "angle": "$dihedralAngle", "axisX": 1, "axisY": 0, "axisZ": 0, "pivot": "$pivot_root" } },

    { "let": "eng_fracs", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0.25, 0.45, 0.65, 0.85] } },
    { "let": "eng_y_right", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a * halfSpan", "a": "$eng_fracs" } },
    { "let": "eng_x", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "wingRootX + a * tan(sweepRad) - engineLength*0.3", "a": "$eng_y_right" } },
    { "let": "eng_z", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "-fuselageRadius - engineRadius - 0.5" } },
    { "let": "eng_centers_right", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$eng_x", "y": "$eng_y_right", "z": "$eng_z" } },
    { "let": "eng_y_left", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "-a", "a": "$eng_y_right" } },
    { "let": "eng_centers_left", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$eng_x", "y": "$eng_y_left", "z": "$eng_z" } },
    { "let": "engine_axis", "op": "vector", "args": { "x": 1, "y": 0, "z": 0 } },
    { "let": "engine_nacelle", "op": "cylinder", "args": { "radius": "$engineRadius", "height": "$engineLength", "axis": "$engine_axis" } },
    { "let": "right_engines", "op": "instances", "args": { "shape": "$engine_nacelle", "points": "$eng_centers_right", "scaleStart": 1, "scaleEnd": 1 } },
    { "let": "left_engines", "op": "instances", "args": { "shape": "$engine_nacelle", "points": "$eng_centers_left", "scaleStart": 1, "scaleEnd": 1 } },

    { "let": "fin_x_fracs", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0.85, 0.9, 0.95, 1] } },
    { "let": "fin_y_fracs", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [1, 1 + tailHeight/fuselageRadius, 1 + tailHeight*0.8/fuselageRadius, 1] } },
    { "let": "fin_x", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a * totalLength", "a": "$fin_x_fracs" } },
    { "let": "fin_y", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a * fuselageRadius", "a": "$fin_y_fracs" } },
    { "let": "fin_z", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0, 0, 0, 0] } },
    { "let": "fin_pts", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$fin_x", "y": "$fin_z", "z": "$fin_y" } },
    { "let": "fin_curve", "op": "polyline", "args": { "points": "$fin_pts", "closed": true } },
    { "let": "fin_solid", "op": "extrude", "args": { "curve": "$fin_curve", "height": 0.3 } },
    { "let": "vertical_stab", "op": "translate", "args": { "shape": "$fin_solid", "y": -0.15 } },

    { "let": "stabSpan", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "wingSpan * 0.3" } },
    { "let": "stabRootChord", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "wingRootChord * 0.4" } },
    { "let": "stabTipChord", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "wingTipChord * 0.4" } },
    { "let": "stabSweep", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "wingSweepAngle * 0.8" } },
    { "let": "stabSweepRad", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "stabSweep * pi / 180" } },
    { "let": "stabRootX", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "totalLength * 0.85" } },
    { "let": "stabTipLE_x", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "stabRootX + stabSpan/2 * tan(stabSweepRad)" } },
    { "let": "stab_x_vals", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0, 1, 2, 3] } },
    { "let": "stab_x", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a==0 ? stabRootX : (a==1 ? stabTipLE_x : (a==2 ? stabTipLE_x + stabTipChord : stabRootX + stabRootChord))", "a": "$stab_x_vals" } },
    { "let": "stab_y_right", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a==0 ? 0 : (a==1 ? stabSpan/2 : (a==2 ? stabSpan/2 : 0))", "a": "$stab_x_vals" } },
    { "let": "stab_y_left", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a==0 ? 0 : (a==1 ? -stabSpan/2 : (a==2 ? -stabSpan/2 : 0))", "a": "$stab_x_vals" } },
    { "let": "stab_z", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0, 0, 0, 0] } },
    { "let": "right_stab_pts", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$stab_x", "y": "$stab_y_right", "z": "$stab_z" } },
    { "let": "left_stab_pts", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$stab_x", "y": "$stab_y_left", "z": "$stab_z" } },
    { "let": "right_stab_curve", "op": "polyline", "args": { "points": "$right_stab_pts", "closed": true } },
    { "let": "left_stab_curve", "op": "polyline", "args": { "points": "$left_stab_pts", "closed": true } },
    { "let": "right_stab_solid", "op": "extrude", "args": { "curve": "$right_stab_curve", "height": 0.2 } },
    { "let": "left_stab_solid", "op": "extrude", "args": { "curve": "$left_stab_curve", "height": 0.2 } },
    { "let": "right_h_stab", "op": "translate", "args": { "shape": "$right_stab_solid", "z": "fuselageRadius - 0.5" } },
    { "let": "left_h_stab", "op": "translate", "args": { "shape": "$left_stab_solid", "z": "fuselageRadius - 0.5" } },

    { "let": "gear_strut", "op": "cylinder", "args": { "radius": 0.3, "height": "fuselageRadius*0.8" } },
    { "let": "gear_wheel", "op": "cylinder", "args": { "radius": 0.8, "height": 0.4, "axis": "$engine_axis" } },
    { "let": "gear_assembly", "op": "compound", "args": { "a": "$gear_strut", "b": "$gear_wheel" } },
    { "let": "gear_x_fracs", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0.2, 0.7] } },
    { "let": "gear_x", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "a * totalLength", "a": "$gear_x_fracs" } },
    { "let": "gear_y", "op": "list", "args": { "values": [0, 0] } },
    { "let": "gear_z", "op": "expr", "args": { "formula": "-fuselageRadius" } },
    { "let": "gear_centers", "op": "points", "args": { "x": "$gear_x", "y": "$gear_y", "z": "$gear_z" } },
    { "let": "landing_gear", "op": "instances", "args": { "shape": "$gear_assembly", "points": "$gear_centers", "scaleStart": 1, "scaleEnd": 1 } }
  ],
  "emit": [
    { "ref": "$fuselage", "color": "#e0e7ff" },
    { "ref": "$right_wing", "color": "#cbd5e1" },
    { "ref": "$left_wing", "color": "#cbd5e1" },
    { "ref": "$right_engines", "color": "#64748b" },
    { "ref": "$left_engines", "color": "#64748b" },
    { "ref": "$vertical_stab", "color": "#3b82f6" },
    { "ref": "$right_h_stab", "color": "#cbd5e1" },
    { "ref": "$left_h_stab", "color": "#cbd5e1" },
    { "ref": "$landing_gear", "color": "#1e293b" }
  ]
}

The engine fault is a [KERNEL]/[RUNTIME] class error being retried by the system — not caused by the graph design. The dead parameter warnings for wingSweepAngle and wingRootXFraction are false positives: both sliders are referenced in inline formulas within wingRootPt_left, wingDir_left, wingRootPt_right, and wingDir_right nodes. Removing unused nodes had no effect, confirming the issue is not graph-structural. Per the rule, leaving the graph alone for engine-level faults.
